extraction.one_line_summary: ITURRIA Mikel attacked with 25km remaining on home roads, held off desperate chase by 6 seconds for maiden professional victory.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo Visma allowed 15+ minute gap to 14-rider break since best placed O'Connor started 37min down GC.
ITURRIA's 25km solo attack succeeded where multiple late break reshuffles failed due to counter-attacking fatigue.
CAVAGNA's TT efforts from previous day caused late-stage collapse despite initially bridging gaps post-puncture.

rider_signals.ITURRIA Mikel: positive: Pro Continental rider sustained 25km solo effort on local roads, suggesting home advantage motivates beyond normal limits
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: Dropped on Col d'Isbeguy despite being strongest GC-placed rider in break, questionable climbing form
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Remi: negative: Legs exploded 8km from finish after bridging post-puncture, confirming TT specialists can't recover within 24hrs
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Jumbo Visma's willingness to concede 18.5 minutes reveals confidence threshold sits around 2-minute GC buffer
